children.text: CSS3 Text, text transform: capitalize, Enclosed Alphanumerics
The text is arranged in pairs of three-letter 'words'. Test passes if there are NO uppercase letters.

rects.text: The text is arranged in pairs of three-letter 'words'. Test passes if there are NO uppercase letters.

children.text: If you are missing a font glyph for a character, ignore that pair, but report which characters were ignored.

rects.text: If you are missing a font glyph for a character, ignore that pair, but report which characters were ignored.
